Task 5 (Proof Assistance): Created AEBroadcastInvariant.lean closing the ECM6 gap. 10 theorems: ABI1 hae_for_voter_after_ae, ABI1b hae_for_voter_of_validAEStep, ABI2 hae_for_other_preserved, ABI3 haeCovered_extend, ABI4 haeCovered_nil, ABI5 haeCovered_induction — all 0 sorry. ABI6/ABI6b/ABI7/ABI8 use sorry pending concrete broadcast-sequence type definition.
hqc_preserved_gap: CLOSED conditional on hae via ECM6. Remaining: AEBroadcastInvariant.lean (~10-20 theorems).
last_task: Task 7+6: CRITIQUE.md + CORRESPONDENCE.md updates (RaftLogAppend + ECM sections)
toolchain_notes: no Mathlib, stdlib only. lakefile.toml globs=[FVSquad.+*]. List.getElem?_append_left h closes (l1++l2)[i]?=l1[i]? when h:i<l1.length. simp [h] closes (l.take n)[j]?=l[j]? when h:j<n.
